mapper.sql: p.place_id AS placeId, p.place_name AS placeName, p.category, p.address, p.phone_number AS phoneNumber, p.description, p.longitude AS longitude, p.latitude AS latitude, p.image_url AS imageUrl
mapper.select:
SELECT FROM place p
AND p.category = #{category}
AND p.address LIKE #{region} || '%'
AND ( p.place_name LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR p.address LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' )
ORDER BY p.place_id DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM place p
AND p.category = #{category}
AND p.address LIKE #{region} || '%'
AND ( p.place_name LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR p.address LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' )

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM place p
AND p.image_url IS NOT NULL
AND p.category = #{category}
AND p.address LIKE #{region} || '%'
AND ( p.place_name LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR p.address LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' )

SELECT placeId, placeName, category, address, imageUrl, viewCount, likeCount, ROWNUM AS rankNum FROM ( SELECT p.place_id AS placeId, p.place_name AS placeName, p.category, p.address, p.image_url AS imageUrl, NVL(p.view_count, 0) AS viewCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM likes l WHERE l.target_id = p.place_id AND l.target_type = 'PLACE') AS likeCount FROM place p WHERE p.image_url IS NOT NULL ORDER BY (NVL(p.view_count, 0) + (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM likes l2 WHERE l2.target_id = p.place_id AND l2.target_type = 'PLACE')) DESC, p.place_id DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= 10

SELECT FROM place p
AND ( p.place_name LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR p.address LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' )
AND p.category = #{category}
ORDER BY p.place_id DESC FETCH FIRST 50 ROWS ONLY

SELECT p.place_id, p.place_name, p.category, p.address, p.phone_number, p.description, p.longitude, p.latitude, p.image_url, NVL(p.view_count, 0) AS view_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM likes l WHERE l.target_id = p.place_id AND l.target_type = 'PLACE') AS like_count, r.opentimefood AS opentime, r.restdatefood AS restdate, r.parkingfood AS parking, atr.usetime AS usetime, atr.closed_days AS closed_days, a.checkintime AS checkintime, a.checkouttime AS checkouttime FROM place p LEFT JOIN restaurant r ON r.place_id = p.place_id AND p.category = 'RESTAURANT' LEFT JOIN attraction atr ON atr.place_id = p.place_id AND p.category IN ('TOUR','CULTURE','LEISURE') LEFT JOIN accommodation a ON a.place_id = p.place_id AND p.category = 'ACCOMMODATION' WHERE p.place_id = #{placeId}
SELECT place_id, place_name, category, address, latitude, longitude, image_url FROM place WHERE place_id = #{placeId}
SELECT image_url FROM place WHERE place_id = #{placeId} AND image_url IS NOT NULL

SELECT image_id AS imageId, festival_id AS festivalId, origin_img_url AS originImgUrl, small_img_url AS smallImgUrl, img_name AS imgName FROM festival_image WHERE festival_id = #{festivalId} AND origin_img_url IS NOT NULL ORDER BY image_id ASC

SELECT festival_id, place_id, api_content_id, event_start_date, event_end_date, play_time, event_place, spend_time, festival_grade, usage_fee, program, sub_event, sponsor1, sponsor1_tel FROM festival WHERE place_id = #{placeId}
SELECT fi.origin_img_url FROM festival_image fi JOIN festival f ON fi.festival_id = f.festival_id WHERE f.place_id = #{placeId} AND fi.origin_img_url IS NOT NULL ORDER BY fi.image_id ASC

SELECT p.place_id AS id, p.place_name AS name, p.address, p.phone_number AS phone, r.opentimefood AS openTime, r.restdatefood AS restDate FROM place p LEFT JOIN restaurant r ON r.place_id = p.place_id WHERE p.place_id = #{placeId} AND p.category = 'RESTAURANT'

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT , 6371 * ACOS( LEAST(1, COS(#{lat} * 3.14159265358979 / 180) * COS(p.latitude * 3.14159265358979 / 180) * COS((p.longitude - #{lng}) * 3.14159265358979 / 180) + SIN(#{lat} * 3.14159265358979 / 180) * SIN(p.latitude * 3.14159265358979 / 180) ) ) AS distance FROM place p WHERE p.place_id != #{placeId} AND p.longitude IS NOT NULL AND p.latitude IS NOT NULL ORDER BY distance ASC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= #{limit}
SELECT DISTINCT SIDO_NAME FROM region ORDER BY SIDO_NAME ASC
